gt_caption: This illustration depicts a fierce warrior character with a muscular build, wielding a glowing sword, set against a snowy backdrop, promoting the mobile game "Game Legends: 5v5 Fair MOBA for Mobile."

This screenshot shows a character in a futuristic suit reacting with surprise or excitement in a neon-lit environment, likely from a video game, with a "Xbox" logo and promotional content visible in the background.
This screenshot from a game shows the "Equipment" screen for a character named Mikasa, featuring customizable gear and loot options.
This illustration depicts a pixelated road sign for "Adventure Park," indicating it is a city limit with a population of 80 and an elevation of 14, set against a nighttime forest backdrop.
This illustration depicts a spooky, moonlit graveyard scene with a gate labeled "CAVE," eerie trees, tombstones, and a mysterious stone structure illuminated by candles.
This digital display is a promotional poster for the game "Ghost Recon: Ghost War," showcasing its launch timeline, upcoming updates, and features such as new modes, maps, classes, and a ranked mode.
This illustration depicts a "Cleric Beginner Kit No.3," showcasing various items such as a shield, crossbow, potions, torch, and other tools arranged in a grid layout.

This illustration is a promotional poster for the game "MEGA X DIVE," featuring a group of colorful, anime-style characters, including iconic robotic heroes and supporting characters, set against a vibrant, futuristic background.

This digital illustration is the promotional art for the game "Super Lucky's Story," featuring the main character, a cheerful orange fox, alongside colorful characters and a whimsical floating island backdrop.
This screenshot showcases a cozy, vintage-style bar or lounge setting with a puzzle game overlay, inviting players to "SOLVE EXCITING PUZZLES."
This digital illustration features a futuristic armored character with glowing eyes and a sword, set against a fiery background, promoting the mobile game "Mobile Legends: Legend."
This screenshot shows a hand holding a faculty ID card from "Monsters University," featuring a cartoonish monster photo and the name "Professor Albertus."

This digital illustration serves as a "Starter Guide" for the game "Oxygen Not Included," featuring three characters—Burt, Otto, and Nikola—standing in front of a large mechanical device, with a control panel and a red button visible in the background.
This photo shows a craps table in a casino, featuring betting areas, chips, and a stick pointing to the "JOIN" section, indicating an ongoing game.
This pixel art illustration depicts a whimsical sign hanging from a pole, labeled "Guests Rest," with a beer mug icon, accompanied by singing birds and floating clouds in a bright, cheerful sky.
This digital poster announces a patch for "Dark Souls III," featuring a knight in ornate armor standing triumphantly over a defeated enemy, with a dramatic, fiery backdrop.
This screenshot depicts a Mercedes-Benz race car, specifically the Sauber C11, with the number 75, parked on a wet track, showcasing its sleek design and sponsor logos.
This screenshot showcases a vibrant battle scene from a mobile game, featuring "Super Heroes" fighting against "Zombie Monsters" in a fantasy setting.

This illustration depicts a colorful board game themed around The Beatles, featuring their iconic images, album covers, and musical elements, with spaces for gameplay such as "Jackpot" and "Super Bonus."

This digital illustration depicts a festive scene featuring a green, anthropomorphic character in a Santa outfit, dancing joyfully in a snowy Christmas setting with a decorated tree, gifts, and a sleigh in the background.
This screenshot depicts a vintage police car labeled "COPS" with flashing lights and a side-mounted cage, parked on a street in a video game environment.
This illustration depicts a festive battle scene from the game "Clash of Clans," featuring characters in Christmas-themed attire engaging in combat with swords and shields.
This digital display is a teaser for the character "Ekko" from the game League of Legends, featuring a close-up of the character's face with the text "EKKO-TEASER SECONDS" prominently displayed.
This illustration depicts a football player diving to catch a ball near the end zone, with a scoreboard showing the game time and scores in the background.
This digital illustration is a promotional card for the "Epic Card Game," featuring a fiery dragon-like creature and the title "Revolution: Flames of Scarros."
This digital illustration features an anthropomorphic cat character wearing a colorful hat, flexing its muscles over a chessboard with fallen pieces, accompanied by the text "SKA-P" and "OVER OVER."
This digital display showcases three distinct Egyptian-inspired game costumes, highlighting their unique designs and thematic elements.
This digital illustration depicts a Pokémon Sword and Shield-themed trainer tournament, showcasing two competitors, Rose and Oleana, facing off in the "Galar Trainer Tournament."

This digital illustration promotes "The Eternal Castle," showcasing a heavily armored character with a menacing appearance, indicating a high-level in-game challenge requiring full gear, normal mode, and an item level of 415+.

This screenshot showcases a futuristic action scene from a video game, featuring characters in advanced combat gear and a robotic figure, with the text "NEW AMAZING ZONE CONTROL MAPS" highlighting new content.
This screenshot depicts a character in a red jacket standing near a motorcycle in a rainy gas station labeled "RE2 GAS STATION."

This screenshot showcases a scene from a Star Wars-themed game, featuring a character battling stormtroopers with blasters, with a prominent Jabba the Hutt in the foreground, and text highlighting "A NEW SECTION IN STAR WARS."
